summary: Verified token-derived ARC/WCW meter fields in backend API and frontend UI. All required token fields (active_context_tokens, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, session_total_tokens, token_source) are present in both POST /api/caos/chat response and GET /api/caos/sessions/{session_id}/artifacts persisted receipts. Frontend Rail Account Menu displays ARC/WCW values correctly with Sent/Received breakdown. Inspector panel shows full token breakdown without crashing. Rail account popover is NOT clipped - fully visible within viewport.
test_credentials: No credentials required - using michael@example.com as default user context
seed_data_creation: Used existing session 1245ea01-160e-4988-aef8-80e438286294 created by main agent for verification
context_for_next_testing_agent: Token meter fields verified in backend and frontend. Session 1245ea01-160e-4988-aef8-80e438286294 has receipt with token_source=provider_usage, active_context_tokens=184, prompt_tokens=381, completion_tokens=37, total_tokens=418. Frontend displays these correctly in Rail Account Menu (ARC/WCW: 184/200000, Sent 381, Received 37) and Inspector panel (full token breakdown grid). Popover positioning is correct - not clipped.

backend_token_fields.POST /api/caos/chat receipt: Contains all required token fields: active_context_tokens, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, total_tokens, session_total_tokens, token_source
backend_token_fields.GET /api/caos/sessions/{session_id}/arti: Persisted receipts include same token fields with matching values
backend_token_fields.token_source: provider_usage (from LLM provider, not local tokenizer fallback)

frontend_token_display.Inspector Panel: Displays full token breakdown: ARC tokens, Sent, Received, Thread total, History, Memory, Continuity, Meter source
frontend_token_display.Popover clipping: NOT clipped - position x=51, y=227, width=420, height=520 fully within 1920x1080 viewport
